text.tspan: ⚠ Kintsugi hold — This command is catastrophic and cannot be undone.
recursively deletes files and directories. This is hard or impossible to undo.
[a] allow once [d] deny [r] always allow here

svg.text: an agent proposes a destructive command — Kintsugi holds it before it runs
you deny it; the attempt lands on the tamper-evident timeline

text.tspan: │ ││summary Runs the deploy target; may push │
j/k move · enter detail · a/d approve/deny · u undo · / filter · q quit

svg.text: the live TUI: cross-agent timeline, detail, and a risk meter
